name: Kanban

examples.title: Drag & Drop Board
examples.code:
<Kanban>
    <KanbanColumn Title="To Do" Badge="3">
        <KanbanCard Title="Design landing page"
                    Labels="@(new List<KanbanCard.KanbanLabel> { new() { Text = "Design", Color = "primary" } })" />
        <KanbanCard Title="Write API docs"
                    Labels="@(new List<KanbanCard.KanbanLabel> { new() { Text = "Docs", Color = "secondary" } })" />
    </KanbanColumn>
    <KanbanColumn Title="In Progress" Badge="1">
        <KanbanCard Title="Build auth flow"
                    Description="Login and register flow."
                    Labels="@(new List<KanbanCard.KanbanLabel> { new() { Text = "High", Color = "destructive" } })" />
    </KanbanColumn>
    <KanbanColumn Title="Done" Badge="1">
        <KanbanCard Title="Project setup" Labels="@(new List<KanbanCard.KanbanLabel> { new() { Text = "Done", Color = "success" } })" />
    </KanbanColumn>
</Kanban>

examples.title: Custom Header
examples.code:
<KanbanColumn>
    <HeaderContent>
        <Flex Class="items-center gap-2">
            <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm font-medium">Sprint 4</Lumeo.Text>
            <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Secondary">5</Badge>
        </Flex>
    </HeaderContent>
    <KanbanCard Title="Task A" />
</KanbanColumn>

mdSummary:
# Kanban

Drag-and-drop board with swimlanes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Drag & Drop
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/kanban

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Kanban | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Kanban | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Kanban | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Labels | `List<KanbanLabel>?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Avatar | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | Draggable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| KanbanCard | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | Title | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | Badge | `int?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | HeaderContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | AllowAdd | `bool` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | OnAdd | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | OnDrop | `EventCallback<DragEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| KanbanColumn | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Kanban) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (KanbanCard) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (KanbanColumn) — RenderFragment slot
- `HeaderContent` (KanbanColumn) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `KanbanCard`, `KanbanColumn`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Kanban />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Kanban/Kanban.razor`
- `UI/Kanban/KanbanCard.razor`
- `UI/Kanban/KanbanColumn.razor`
